name: yean-lead-automation
description: YEAN Technologies semi-automated lead generation system: discovers businesses, checks their online presence, drafts personalised pitches, and routes them through an approval queue before outreach.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace server & npm run dev --workspace dashboard
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace dashboard
